incidents.title: Remnawave upstream outage
safe_state_actions: deny bootstrap, refresh, and token issuance when upstream truth is stale or unavailable
preserve shared durable store state and prior evidence artifacts
escalation_triggers: supported-upstream verification remains red after upstream health is restored
account lifecycle cannot be reconciled from webhook and refresh evidence
nonrecoverable_artifacts: upstream mutations that never reached Verta before the outage

incidents.title: Bridge auth drift
safe_state_actions: fail closed on bridge auth and store auth mismatches
do not bypass store-service auth during recovery
escalation_triggers: rotated or corrected credentials still fail on a clean rerun
operators cannot determine whether the incident is drift or compromise
nonrecoverable_artifacts: bridge or store credentials exposed outside the intended trust boundary

incidents.title: Secret rotation
safe_state_actions: rotate credentials atomically for the affected trust boundary
re-run the maintained verification lane before reopening traffic
escalation_triggers: rotation cannot be completed atomically across the deployment label
credential rotation restores auth but replay or lifecycle behavior stays inconsistent
nonrecoverable_artifacts: compromised secrets that have already leaked

incidents.title: Replay cache and webhook recovery
safe_state_actions: preserve shared durable replay and webhook state
prefer deterministic denial over ambiguous replay recovery
escalation_triggers: duplicate webhook rejection still fails after backend health is restored
replay drift cannot be localized to one deployment label or backend boundary
nonrecoverable_artifacts: duplicate external side effects already accepted before replay rejection was restored

incidents.title: Profile disable
safe_state_actions: deny bootstrap, refresh, and token exchange after the upstream lifecycle transition
keep release promotion blocked until the disable drill is green again
escalation_triggers: disable denies are inconsistent across bootstrap, refresh, and token exchange
webhook or reconcile behavior does not converge after disable
nonrecoverable_artifacts: disabled or revoked device grants that must be bootstraped again

incidents.title: Rollout rollback
safe_state_actions: force the explicit maintained stream-fallback safe state
preserve rollback artifacts and keep release promotion blocked
escalation_triggers: rollback drill cannot prove explicit fallback with retained artifacts
fallback integrity or degradation visibility is no longer true
nonrecoverable_artifacts: rollout state advanced without preserved evidence
